title: Torrezx-New Bookshelf
description: Replace the bookshelf with a version more similar to the new Chisel Bookshelf.
body:
Torrezx-New Bookshelf


ESPAÑOL
Este texturepack cambia la textura de la libreria de mc por esta nueva mostrada en la nueva update de la 1.20,disfuta con tu nueva libreria !


ENGLISH
This texturepack changes the texture of the mc library for this new one shown in the new update of 1.20, enjoy with your new library!


Replace/Reemplaza:

-Bookshelf
